home.heroLead: LogiBox is Azerbaijan's operations partner for compliant food packing, cold-chain transport, and dependable retail delivery.
home.servicesTitle: From primary pack to proof of delivery
home.servicesLead: One operating model: standardized handovers, visible exceptions, and bilingual documentation.
home.lanesLead: Capital intensity where fleets earn their keep — staged relays everywhere else.
home.guidesLead: Checklists and KPI notes you can paste into SOPs.
home.blogLead: Short reads on temperature, dwell, and retail compliance.
home.reviewsTitle: Teams that switched to predictable handovers
home.review1: We cut temperature alarms at transfer points within a quarter — the telemetry pack was the missing layer.
home.review2: Secondary packaging quality finally matches our brand book; LogiBox aligned film specs with our DC scans.
home.review3: Claims used to take weeks. Photo checklist + carrier workflow brought resolution down to days.

about.title: About LogiBox
about.lead: We help food businesses in Azerbaijan keep promises to supermarkets, hospitality, and export partners.
about.p1: Our teams blend packing engineering with insured mileage. You get fewer surprises at the gate and cleaner paperwork at destination.
about.p2: This site demonstrates bilingual structure, policy pages, and a growing library of logistics content. Replace demo copy with your final narratives.
